prompt: Create a realistic two-panel vertical photo collage of an adult plus-size woman at an indoor swimming pool, wearing a glossy navy blue high-cut one-piece competition-style swimsuit with white trim and the side text Queen Giant. The collage contains exactly 2 panels: the left panel is a full-body three-quarter standing pose beside a bright blue lap pool, barefoot on pale poolside tiles, one leg slightly crossed forward, with the arched glass-and-steel ceiling and lane ropes visible in the background; the right panel is a closer upper-body-to-thigh portrait in a locker-room or pool changing area with mirrors and white curtains behind her, including her rear reflection in the mirror. The subject has black hair tied back in a low ponytail, a curvy athletic build, natural skin texture, and a neutral pose; her face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular blur for anonymity in both panels. Use crisp smartphone-style documentary photography, realistic indoor pool lighting, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, accurate reflections, wet-look shiny swimsuit fabric, soft highlights on skin, and a clean editorial collage layout with a thin white divider between the two images.
